title: What it looks like to pray like a man
caption:
Most men don't pray because they don't know what to say.

Say that. It counts.

Prayer isn't a performance for God. It's a conversation with your Father. And like any real conversation, it doesn't have to be eloquent — it has to be honest.

The problem isn't that you can't pray. It's that you've been waiting for the right words, the right feeling, the right moment. So you go weeks without really talking to Him. Then a crisis hits and suddenly you're desperate.

Build the conversation before the emergency. Show up daily — not just when you're drowning. Name the specific thing you're carrying. And when it goes quiet and feels like the ceiling, stay. That's not God leaving. That's the test of whether this is real for you.

"Pray without ceasing." — 1 Thessalonians 5:17.

#faith #prayer #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #scripture #discipleship
theme: He chases God, not a feeling.
